prerequisites: An active Waiteraid restaurant account with valid login credentials (username, password) and the associated restaurant name.
An auth_hash generated from those credentials via the Waiteraid /wa-api/auth endpoint.
Your restaurant identifier (restid), which is required on every API method call.
A start date (YYYY-MM-DD) marking the earliest record to sync.

authMethods.name: Auth hash and restaurant id
authMethods.summary: Waiteraid authenticates each request with an auth_hash plus a restid (restaurant identifier), both passed as query parameters against https://app.waiteraid.com/wa-api/. Obtain the auth_hash by calling the /wa-api/auth endpoint with your Waiteraid username, password, and restaurant name; the restid identifies the restaurant the call operates on. Set both as the connector's auth_hash and restid secret fields.

setupSteps.title: Generate the auth_hash
setupSteps.body: Call the Waiteraid auth endpoint at https://app.waiteraid.com/wa-api/auth with your account username, password, and restaurant name. The response returns an auth_hash that replaces sending raw credentials on every subsequent call. Copy this value into the connector's auth_hash field.

setupSteps.title: Find your restaurant id (restid)
setupSteps.body: Identify the restid for the restaurant you want to sync. This restaurant identifier is required on Waiteraid API methods (for example searchBooking) and is passed as a query parameter. Enter it in the connector's restid field.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Provide a start_date in YYYY-MM-DD format. The connector uses this date to bound which records are fetched.

setupSteps.title: Save and verify
setupSteps.body: Save the connector with auth_hash, restid, and start_date populated. The connector calls the Waiteraid wa-api methods using auth_hash and restid as query parameters to confirm access.
